overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character in traditional orange robes exploring a lush forest environment. The clip progresses from a sunny forest clearing to a dramatic stormy overlook, showcasing dynamic weather transitions and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest clearing with large shade tree

agents.ego_description: standing motionless beside a large leaning tree, surveying the forest surroundings and distant mountain

entered.detail: mature deciduous tree with thick trunk and spreading branches casting dappled shadows
distant mountain peak with white snow visible against the blue sky
rolling terrain covered in vibrant green grass and scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a sun-drenched forest clearing beside a large leaning tree. The camera holds steady, capturing the lush green hillside and a distant snow-capped mountain visible through the foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path through dense trees

events.description: character begins walking forward away from the tree, heading toward the open hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path through the forest, ascending slightly toward a vantage point with the mountain ahead

entered.detail: dense green foliage of deciduous trees forming a partial canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the tree along a grassy forest path. As they move forward, the camera follows, revealing more of the surrounding dense forest and bringing the snow-capped mountain into clearer view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: dark storm clouds rapidly gather and completely obscure the snow-capped mountain peak
sunlight breaks through the storm clouds creating dramatic god rays over the forest

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky overlook, slowly rotating to survey the changing weather and panoramic forest valley views

entered.detail: elevated rocky outcrop with moss-covered stones providing panoramic views of the forest valley below
dark ominous storm clouds gathering rapidly and covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky overlook as the weather shifts dramatically. Storm clouds roll in and obscure the mountain, while the camera orbits around the character capturing the changing light. Sun rays eventually break through the dark clouds, illuminating the forest valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush forest that transforms from a serene, sun-drenched clearing into a dramatic, storm-swept overlook. It begins beside a large leaning tree on a green hillside, where a distant snow-capped mountain is visible through the foliage. As the character walks away from the tree along a grassy path, the camera follows them deeper into the dense forest, bringing the mountain into clearer view. The scene then shifts to a rocky overlook where dark storm clouds roll in to obscure the peak, while the camera orbits the character to capture the fading light. Finally, the gloom breaks as sun rays pierce through the clouds, illuminating the expansive forest valley below.
